jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated and removed mockito-all artifact with the standard mockito-core artifact.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: The mockito-all artifact is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer Mockito versions required for Java 17/Spring Boot 3.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Add mockito-junit-jupiter dependency to support JUnit 5 integration with Mockito.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this dependency, Mockito extensions for JUnit 5 (like @MockitoExtension) will fail at runtime with ClassNotFoundException.
JUnit 4 is incompatible with JUnit 5 platform used in Spring Boot 3; tests using JUnit 5 annotations will fail if JUnit 4 is present or if JUnit 5 engine is missing.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/META.general_idea: Migrate beans.xml from Spring namespace to Jakarta EE namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/META.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+ APIs; using the old Spring beans namespace or javax-based schemas will cause deployment failures or classpath conflicts as the application context expects Jakarta namespaces.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/WEB-.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to align with Spring Boot 3 requirements.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/WEB-.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ require the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors as the container expects Jakarta annotations and descriptors.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/WEB-.general_idea: Upgrade web-app version attribute from 2.5 to 6.0 to match the new Jakarta EE schema.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/WEB-.why_exists: The schema location points to web-app_6_0.xsd; keeping version="2.5" may cause validation errors or prevent the application server from recognizing newer features required by the updated schema.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation import to JUnit 5.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not available or compatible in a pure JUnit 5 environment; compilation fails if the old import is used without the JUnit 4 vintage engine or migration.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertion import to JUnit 5.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: JUnit 4 assertion classes are not available in JUnit 5; compilation fails if the old import is used.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation import to JUnit 5.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not available or compatible in a pure JUnit 5 test environment configured by Spring Boot 3.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertion import to JUnit 5.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: JUnit 4 assertion classes are not available or compatible in a pure JUnit 5 test environment configured by Spring Boot 3.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new testing framework.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations (@Before, @Test) are not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner with JUnit 5 extension to enable test discovery and execution.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not support @RunWith; tests will not be discovered or executed without @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class).

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Update Mockito imports and configuration for JUnit 5 compatibility.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: MockitoJUnitRunner is not compatible with JUnit 5; MockitoExtension is required for proper integration.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 assertions with JUnit 5 assertions.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: junit.framework.TestCase is part of JUnit 3/4 and not available in JUnit 5; tests will fail to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' in modern Java toolchains; using 'release' ensures consistent compilation for Java 17.
